action.file_text:
model: ParkingSpot
slug: parking_spots
table: parking_spots

options:
  belongs_to_organization: false
  soft_deletes: false
  audit_trail: false
  pagination: true
  per_page: 25

columns:
  number:
    type: string
    nullable: false
    searchable: true
    filterable: true
    sortable: true
  spot_type:
    type: string
    default: "standard"
    filterable: true
  is_available:
    type: boolean
    default: true
    filterable: true
  parking_lot_id:
    type: foreignId
    foreign_model: ParkingLot
    index: true

relationships:
  - type: belongsTo
    model: ParkingLot
  - type: hasMany
    model: Reservation
    dependent: destroy

permissions:
  admin:
    actions: [index, show, store, update, destroy]
    show_fields: "*"
    create_fields: "*"
    update_fields: "*"
  manager:
    actions: [index, show, store, update]
    show_fields: "*"
    create_fields: [number, spot_type, is_available, parking_lot_id]
    update_fields: [number, spot_type, is_available, parking_lot_id]
  member:
    actions: [index, show]
    show_fields: [id, number, spot_type, is_available, parking_lot_id]
    create_fields: []
    update_fields: []
